message:
perf(widgets): replace bounds-checked get_mut with set_fast across widget rendering

Migrate 9 widget files from the pattern:
  if let Some(cell) = frame.buffer.get_mut(x, y) { cell.content = ...; cell.fg = ...; }
to the unchecked:
  let mut cell = Cell::from_char(...); cell.fg = ...; frame.buffer.set_fast(x, y, cell);

This eliminates redundant bounds checks in tight rendering loops where
coordinates are already guaranteed to be within the buffer area by the
widget's layout contract. Affected widgets: command_palette (border and
input rendering), error_boundary (fallback clear), inspector (panel
text overlay), keyboard_drag (drag border), notification_queue
(saturating_duration_since for dedup window), rule (title padding),
and toast (full border drawing).

Also adopt crate::contains_ignore_case() in help_index (4 call sites),
command_palette scorer (tag matching), and notification_queue dedup
window cleanup, replacing ad-hoc to_lowercase().contains() patterns
with the centralized case-insensitive substring search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
